purpose: This repository provides a common utility library for NServiceBus implementation in the CRB COS (Corebridge Customer Operations System) platform. It offers standardized configurations, behaviors, extensions, and patterns for using NServiceBus messaging across the COS ecosystem.
businessFeatures: Global settings management with database-backed configuration
Database-driven endpoint instance mapping for dynamic routing
Well-known message header propagation and management
Support for unsubscribing from events when no longer needed

apis.purpose: Provides standardized configuration methods for NServiceBus endpoints with CRB-specific defaults
Provides access to centralized configuration settings stored in database
Extends NServiceBus message handling with CRB-specific functionality including user context and simplified sending/publishing

ambiguities: The 'COS' system appears to be a Customer Operations System but its specific business functionality is not defined in this library
References to 'CredentialWatcherConnectionProvider' but the implementation details are not present in this repository
The 'WellKnownHeaderNames' class is referenced but not fully defined in the visible code
